quiz_title: The Curious Incident of the Dog in the Night-Time Quiz

questions.question: What animal is Wellington?
What does Christopher use to label his book's chapters?
Why does Christopher find facial expressions difficult?
options: He processes the world through literal logic

questions.question: What is Christopher's favorite subject in school?
What color does Christopher hate the most?
Who is Siobhan?
What kind of car does Christopher's father drive?
Why did Christopher's father lie about his mother's death?
options: He wanted to protect Christopher from the pain of her leaving
He didn't know where she was

questions.question: How does Christopher define 'love'?
options: Helping someone when they are in trouble, looking after them, and telling them the truth
Wanting to be with someone forever

questions.question: What is the significance of the title 'The Curious Incident of the Dog in the Night-Time'?
options: It's a quote from Sherlock Holmes, reflecting Christopher's obsession with detective stories
It was Christopher's mother's favorite book
It refers to a real police case

questions.question: What triggers Christopher's journey to London?
options: He discovers letters from his mother hidden in his father's cupboard

questions.question: What does Christopher use to determine if a day will be 'good' or 'bad'?
options: The colors of cars he sees on the way to school
What his father cooks for breakfast

questions.question: What did Christopher's father do to Wellington?
options: Accidentally hit him with the car
Killed him with a garden fork

questions.question: What A-level exam does Christopher plan to take?
How does Christopher react when overwhelmed by sensory input or emotions?
options: He curls into a ball and groans

questions.question: What is the name of Christopher's pet rat?
Why does Christopher not understand metaphors?
options: He has never been taught them
He thinks they are lies because they describe something by using a word for something it isn't
His father forbade him from using them

questions.question: Where does Christopher's mother live after leaving?
What does Christopher find in his father's shirt pocket that leads to a major discovery?
What is the name of the detective Christopher admires?
How does Christopher's mother die according to his father's lie?
What does Christopher use to calm himself when stressed?
What happens to Christopher's father at the end of the novel?
options: He buys Christopher a puppy and tries to rebuild trust

questions.question: What is Christopher's full name?
What mathematical concept does Christopher explain in detail in the appendix?
Why does Christopher refuse to eat food that has touched other food on his plate?
options: He needs order and separation to feel safe

questions.question: What is the name of the train station Christopher arrives at in London?
How does Christopher navigate the London Underground?
options: He uses a map and follows logical step-by-step instructions

questions.question: What does Christopher's mother do for work in London?
What is the central theme of the novel?
options: Truth vs. Lies and the search for order in a chaotic world
